description: Fetch the current Zhihu hot list from the rendered https://www.zhihu.com/hot page using a browser session. Returns ranked items with title, URL, and heat value. Use this when the official API or static HTML is blocked and the browser session can render Zhihu.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of hot list items to return. Defaults to 20. Must be an integer from 1 to 50.
